title: Youtube Poop - Strive for Love (Part Three)
description:
This is NOT the finale of Strive for Love! Yes, I know part two says it is and I apologize for any confusion. Part five will be the REAL finale.

Anyways! If you recall the ending to #2, Link is serving Zelda who is now allied with Ganon (and Impa). She told him to find her father... but Link got a little lost. :P The movie starts with him walking into a friendly store for help... meanwhile, Gwonam (the genie) and the King of Hyrule are safely hidden far far away where they can continue their awkward but entertaining romance... but just how safe are they?

Oh! I nearly forgot...

I'd love everyone's opinion on this video. The support from all of my viewers is what keeps the series going. So remember to rate, fave, and comment if you enjoy the series! :)

Watch the entire series!
